---
name: Bug report
about: Something broken? A dead link? Let us know.
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**What's broken?**
A clear description of what isn't working.

**Where did you find it?**
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] llms.txt / llms-full.txt
- [ ] A link to an external resource
- [ ] Other: 

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Additional context**
Anything else that might help — screenshots, browser, etc.
